mechanism: Toxic diterpenoid alkaloids such as aconitine open voltage-gated sodium channels, increasing sodium influx and delaying repolarization, causing cardiotoxicity and neurotoxicity【472555319349189†L263-L265】【472555319349189†L307-L310】.
contraindications: Highly toxic; ingestion can cause severe arrhythmias, paralysis and death; avoid internal use; handling requires caution.
